name: Veggie Thai Curry Soup
intro: Indulge in the delightful flavors of this curry soup, inspired by your favorite Thai restaurant. While shiitake mushrooms are the preferred choice, you can use any fresh mushroom variety to create this delicious dish. Enhancing the soup's taste, fresh basil and lime infuse a vibrant and refreshing flavor profile.

ingredients.item: Drained and halved whole baby corn - 8.75 ounces

method: Cook noodles according to package directions.
Heat oil in a 6-quart stock pot over medium heat, then fry the curry paste for about 30 seconds.
Add coconut milk little by little and stir.
Add soup and soy sauce, and let it boil.
Add tofu and vegetables to the pot and let it cook for 3-5 minutes.
Drain the noodles (Step 1), then add to the soup (Step 5). Divide the soup into bowls
Serve each dish with basil and lime wedges.
